user.title: Configure OPCOM Romania
user.description: Set up OPCOM Romania PZU electricity price import.

data.days_ahead: Days to fetch ahead (1 = today, 2 = today + tomorrow)
data.top_n_per_resolution: Windows per resolution (optional, e.g. 15:4, 30:6, 60:2). Leave empty for global value.
data.price_threshold_low: Alert when price drops below this value (RON/MWh). Empty = disabled.
data.price_threshold_high: Alert when price rises above this value (RON/MWh). Empty = disabled.

error.invalid_lang: Invalid language. Use ro or en.
error.out_of_range: Value is out of the allowed range.
error.threshold_low_gte_high: The low threshold must be less than the high threshold.

settings.title: Integration Settings
settings.description: Update OPCOM Romania integration settings. Optional fields can be cleared to disable them.

data.days_ahead: Days to fetch ahead (1 = today, 2 = today + tomorrow)
data.top_n_per_resolution: Windows per resolution (optional, e.g. 15:4, 30:6, 60:2). Clear to use global value.
data.price_threshold_low: Alert when price drops below this value (RON/MWh). Clear to disable.
data.price_threshold_high: Alert when price rises above this value (RON/MWh). Clear to disable.

licenta.title: OPCOM Romania License
licenta.description:
{license_status}

Enter your license key to activate or renew the integration.

error.invalid_lang: Invalid language. Use ro or en.
error.out_of_range: Value is out of the allowed range.
error.threshold_low_gte_high: The low threshold must be less than the high threshold.
error.license_key_invalid: Invalid license key. Check the format and try again.
error.license_already_used: This license key has already been used on another installation.
error.license_fingerprint_mismatch: This license key is bound to a different installation.
error.license_network_error: Cannot connect to the license server. Check your internet connection.
error.license_server_error: License server error. Please try again later.
